# נ.ט שערים — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A professional electric gate service company specializing in panel gate repairs and installations, operating in the southern region of Israel. The business focuses on converting website visitors into paying customers, suggesting a service-oriented brand that emphasizes reliability, local expertise, and quick response times for residential and commercial clients in the south.

## How to Contact Us

- Email: ntprojectsales@gmail.com
- Phone: 077-231-4949
- Phone (tel): tel:0772314949
- Address: רח ירושלים, ראשון לציון, מרכז, ישראל

### Contact form
- URL: https://nt-shearim.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://nt-shearim.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About נ.ט שערים
A professional electric gate service company specializing in panel gate repairs and installations, operating in the southern region of Israel. The business focuses on converting website visitors into paying customers, suggesting a service-oriented brand that emphasizes reliability, local expertise, and quick response times for residential and commercial clients in the south.

## Services/Products
- תיקון שערי פאנלים
- התקנת שערי פאנלים

## Target Audience
בעלי בתים ועסקים באזור דרום הארץ

## Industry
שירותי שערים חשמליים

---

- Robots: https://nt-shearim.zappy5.app/robots.txt
